assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT modify any code files — it only reads, verifies, and reports (constraint 1.11)

No source code files (e.g., .rs, .toml, .yaml) were created or modified. The criterion files analyze code diffs by quoting snippets but do not modify any source files.

assertion_results.text: The report does NOT auto-merge the PR — it presents findings for human review (constraint 1.13)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md concludes with 'Overall: PASS' on line 37 but contains no merge action, no gh pr merge command, and no indication of auto-merging. The report presents a verification table and implementation summary for human review.
